structural_findings: The knowledge corpus is strongest in governance, product chronology, media/source profiles, and timelines.

Lore has only a domain guide and one canon registry despite a much larger normalized lore corpus; later expansion should create reader-oriented entity and setting histories without copying raw taxonomy records.
Several indexes are intentionally compact navigation pages and should not be judged by word count alone.
Publication candidates should synthesize related knowledge pages rather than expose every registry or source profile as a standalone reader destination.
